title: Amtech F3365 100mm (4") Twist knot wire wheel
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: TOUGH CLEANING: This 100mm (4") twist knot wire wheel has wires that have been twisted into a tight spiral to maximise abrasive action
VERSATILE: It is ideal for removing rust, paint and carbon, plus for weld cleaning and metal preparation tasks
11,000 RPM: With an M14 arbor, it operates a maximum 11,000 RPM
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Wire Wheel See more

specifications_table.Recommended uses for product: ‎Carbon Removal, Metal Preparation, Paint Removal, Rust Removal, Weld Cleaning
